records.ety: [L. dividendum thing to be divided, neut. of the gerundive of dividere: cf. F. dividende.]

defs: A sum of money to be divided and distributed; the share of a sum divided that falls to each individual; a distribute sum, share, or percentage; -- applied to the profits as appropriated among shareholders, and to assets as apportioned among creditors; as, the dividend of a bank, a railway corporation, or a bankrupt estate.
A number or quantity which is to be divided.
